channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Secure Access Service Edge Technologies to Gain Popularity in 2025: Survey Reveals Challenges Ahead
item.description: A recent survey by Hughes Network Systems and Cybersecurity Insiders reveals that secure access service edge (SASE) technologies will gain popularity in 2025. However, network and security leaders face several challenges in implementing SASE, including securing remote connections, protecting cloud infrastructure, and managing access policies.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
